name: WaveBoost
description: Boost tab media volume up to 3× with a built-in safety limiter and zero network access.—WaveBoost

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'
